homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (worst) to 7 (best).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: Does this description contain information that is unrelated to the audio clip? Rate on a scale from 1 (entire caption completely unrelated to the audio clip) to 7 (completely related)

questions.name: Sample 2
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This intense instrumental track uses a fast-paced rhythm and distorted guitars to create a chaotic, aggressive atmosphere perfect for high-stakes action sequences. The heavy, dark mood is driven by synthesizers and electronic drums that blend with glitchy sound effects to produce an urgent and dangerous feel. Ultimately, the music serves as a tense soundtrack ideal for video game boss battles or industrial-themed scenes.

Prominent synthesizers and electronic drums drive the futuristic sound, making it suitable for scenes set in a cyberpunk city or as a game soundtrack.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This instrumental track relies heavily on synthesizers to create a dreamy and atmospheric soundscape with a slow, steady rhythm. The repetitive motifs establish a hypnotic mood that evokes the mysterious intrigue of a cinematic film score. Its spacious texture makes it an ideal fit for background scenes where a character searches for something or experiences the unknown.

questions.name: Sample 7
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This piece is a perfect example of ambient music, featuring soothing and atmospheric soundscapes that evoke a meditative mood. The absence of vocals allows listeners to fully immerse themselves in the gentle rhythms and ethereal textures created by soft instrumentation. Ideally suited for relaxation or introspection, the slow tempo maintains a calm ambiance throughout the track.

questions.name: Sample 9
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION:
questions.caption: This solo instrumental performance features a banjo and acoustic guitar, with the banjo delivering a fast-paced melody over a steady rhythmic foundation. The music maintains a lively and upbeat mood that carries a subtle hint of melancholy, creating an atmosphere ideal for a Western movie soundtrack set in a rural landscape. Although the tracklist suggests avant-garde or experimental soundscape elements, this specific segment focuses on traditional folk instrumentation.
